mapper.select:
select * from purchase_receipt
and receipt_code like concat('%', #{receiptCode}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_receipt(receipt_code, supplier_code, supplier_name, receipt_date, status, inspection_status, total_quantity, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{receiptCode}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierName}, #{receiptDate}, #{status}, #{inspectionStatus}, #{totalQuantity}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update purchase_receipt set receipt_code = #{receiptCode}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, receipt_date = #{receiptDate}, status = #{status}, inspection_status = #{inspectionStatus}, total_quantity = #{totalQuantity}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from purchase_receipt where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select * from purchase_receipt_line where receipt_id = #{receiptId} order by line_no
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_receipt_line(receipt_id, line_no, source_order_id, source_order_code, source_order_line_id, source_order_line_no, material_id, material_code, material_name, spec, unit, received_quantity, qualified_quantity, rejected_quantity, pending_quantity, inbound_quantity, lot_no, warehouse_code, location_code, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{receiptId}, #{lineNo}, #{sourceOrderId}, #{sourceOrderCode}, #{sourceOrderLineId}, #{sourceOrderLineNo}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{spec}, #{unit}, #{receivedQuantity}, #{qualifiedQuantity}, #{rejectedQuantity}, #{pendingQuantity}, #{inboundQuantity}, #{lotNo}, #{warehouseCode}, #{locationCode}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.delete:
delete from purchase_receipt_line where receipt_id in
#{id}
